title: Warning from Space
writer: Jay Cipes, Gentaro Nakajima, Hideo Oguni
actors: Keizô Kawasaki, Toyomi Karita, Bin Yagisawa
plot: UFOs are seen around Tokyo. Because they look like giant starfish the aliens cannot approach us without creating panic. Hence one of them sacrifices itself and takes the form of a popular female singer. It/she warns mankind that a...
